CustomField.formula:
IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Completed'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Dropped'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'To Be Started') && Deadline__c >= TODAY (), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Ongoing') && Deadline__c >= TODAY ()), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Vert"),
IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'On Hold'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Ongoing') && Deadline__c <= TODAY ()), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif", "Jaune"),
IF( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'To Be Started') && Deadline__c <= TODAY (), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Rouge"), '')
) )
CustomField.label: Criticity
